channel.title: +Society on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Society on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Administrative
item.description: Civil administration Politicians who gained standing in military. Roman consuls with annual appointments in the first punic war. Separation of military and civil services leadership. Consolidation of the Roman empire [YT] Law enforcement Pune under marATha-s TW17. Succession Hereditary Adaption

item.title: Relationship investment
